prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_1: small purple rubber sphere
  - obj_2: small brown rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: large cyan metal sphere
  - obj_4: large gray metal cube
  - obj_5: small green metal sphere
  - obj_6: large green rubber sphere
  - obj_7: small blue metal sphere
  - obj_8: large brown metal cube
  - obj_9: small cyan rubber cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0481] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0482] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0483] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0484] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0485] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0486] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0487] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0488] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0489] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0490] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0491] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0492] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0493] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0494] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0495] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0496] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0497] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0498] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0499] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0500] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene and answer distance comparison questions.

Let me estimate the positions of each object based on the image:

- obj_0 (small cyan metal cube): right side, back area
- obj_1 (small purple rubber sphere): left-center area
- obj_2 (small brown rubber cylinder): left area, behind purple sphere
- obj_3 (large cyan metal sphere): center-front area
- obj_4 (large gray metal cube): center-back area
- obj_5 (small green metal sphere): front-right area
- obj_6 (large green rubber sphere): back-right area
- obj_7 (small blue metal sphere): far left area
- obj_8 (large brown metal cube): center area
- obj_9 (small cyan rubber cylinder): front-left area

Let me assign approximate 3D coordinates (x, y, z) where x is left-right, y is up-down, z is front-back (larger = farther back):

- obj_0 (cyan metal cube): (7, 1, 6)
- obj_1 (purple sphere): (2, 1, 4)
- obj_2 (brown cylinder): (1, 1, 5)
- obj_3 (cyan metal sphere): (4, 1, 2)
- obj_4 (gray metal cube): (5, 1, 7)
- obj_5 (green metal sphere): (6, 1, 1)
- obj_6 (green rubber sphere): (6, 1, 8)
- obj_7 (blue metal sphere): (-1, 1, 4)
- obj_8 (brown metal cube): (3, 1, 5)
- obj_9 (cyan rubber cylinder): (2, 1, 2)

Now I'll calculate distances for each question:

obj_2 to obj_8: sqrt((3-1)²+(5-5)²) = sqrt(4) = 2
obj_5 to obj_7: sqrt((6-(-1))²+(1-4)²) = sqrt(49+9) = sqrt(58) ≈ 7.6
obj_5 to obj_9: sqrt((6-2)²+(1-2)²) = sqrt(16+1) = sqrt(17) ≈ 4.1
obj_6 to obj_7: sqrt((6-(-1))²+(8-4)²) = sqrt(49+16) = sqrt(65) ≈ 8.1
obj_6 to obj_9: sqrt((6-2)²+(8-2)²) = sqrt(16+36) = sqrt(52) ≈ 7.2
obj_7 to obj_9: sqrt((2-(-1))²+(2-4)²) = sqrt(9+4) = sqrt(13) ≈ 3.6

obj_2 to obj_9: sqrt((2-1)²+(2-5)²) = sqrt(1+9) = sqrt(10) ≈ 3.2
obj_3 to obj_4: sqrt((5-4)²+(7-2)²) = sqrt(1+25) = sqrt(26) ≈ 5.1
obj_3 to obj_5: sqrt((6-4)²+(1-2)²) = sqrt(4+1) = sqrt(5) ≈ 2.2
obj_3 to obj_6: sqrt((6-4)²+(8-2)²) = sqrt(4+36) = sqrt(40) ≈ 6.3
obj_3 to obj_7: sqrt((4-(-1))²+(2-4)²) = sqrt(25+4) = sqrt(29) ≈ 5.4
obj_3 to obj_8: sqrt((3-4)²+(5-2)²) = sqrt(1+9) = sqrt(10) ≈ 3.2
obj_4 to obj_5: sqrt((6-5)²+(1-7)²) = sqrt(1+36) = sqrt(37) ≈ 6.1
obj_4 to obj_6: sqrt((6-5)²+(8-7)²) = sqrt(1+1) = sqrt(2) ≈ 1.4
obj_4 to obj_7: sqrt((5-(-1))²+(7-4)²) = sqrt(36+9) = sqrt(45) ≈ 6.7
obj_4 to obj_8: sqrt((3-5)²+(5-7)²) = sqrt(4+4) = sqrt(8) ≈ 2.8
obj_5 to obj_6: sqrt((6-6)²+(1-8)²) = sqrt(0+49) = 7
obj_5 to obj_8: sqrt((3-6)²+(5-1)²) = sqrt(9+16) = sqrt(25) = 5
obj_6 to obj_8: sqrt((3-6)²+(5-8)²) = sqrt(9+9) = sqrt(18) ≈ 4.2
obj_7 to obj_8: sqrt((3-(-1))²+(5-4)²) = sqrt(16+1) = sqrt(17) ≈ 4.1
